heading_content_part: Privacy Policy - Supersonic SoftwareSupersonic SoftwareHomeFAQsInstructionsActive Keep AliveActive ReconnectScreenshotsPrivacy PolicyDownloadPrivacy PolicyThis privacy policy governs your use of the software application Connection Stabilizer Booster (“Application”) for mobile devices that was created by Supersonic Software. The Application is designed to tackle internet connectivity issues on wireless networks.

decoder_heading: What Information Does the Application Obtain and How Is It Used?
ident_heading: What information does the Application obtain and how is it used?
heading_content_part: What information does the Application obtain and how is it used?
User Provided Information

The Application obtains the information about your device when you contact us for support, using the in-app contact option. This information will be displayed to you before it is transmitted as a part of your support email. The email address that you use to contact us may be stored and used for future communication with you. If you upgrade to the premium (“Pro”) version of the Application, the email address that you will be prompted to select during purchase may be securely stored and used for purchase validation and support.
We may also use the information you provided us to contact you from time to time to provide you with important information, required notices and marketing promotions.
Automatically Collected Information

In addition, the Application may collect certain information automatically, to facilitate in-app advertising in the free version of the Application. This information will never be received or stored by the creator of the apps but used only by advertising partners to display relevant advertisements within the app. Please refer to the section entitled “Automatic Data Collection and Advertising” for further details regarding this type of information collection. Additionally, the Application may collect certain device information to facilitate fraud prevention. If any illegal activity is suspected by our servers and/or Application, information including but not limited to IP addresses associated with such activity may be automatically logged.

decoder_heading: Does the Application Collect Precise Real-Time Location Information of the Device?
ident_heading: Does the Application collect precise real time location information of the device?
heading_content_part: Does the Application collect precise real time location information of the device?No, this Application does not collect precise information about the location of your mobile device.

decoder_heading: Do Third Parties See and/or Have Access to Information Obtained by the Application?
ident_heading: Do third parties see and/or have access to information obtained by the Application?
heading_content_part: Do third parties see and/or have access to information obtained by the Application?No. We do not share your information with third parties except for the exceptional circumstances described in this privacy statement.

Automatic Data Collection and AdvertisingWe may work with analytics companies to help us understand how the Application is being used, such as the frequency and duration of usage. This information may be used to improve our products and services. This information is usually in aggregate form, and never personally identifiable.

We use third-party advertising companies to serve ads when you use the free version of the Application. These companies may use aggregated information (not including your name, address, email address or telephone number) about your visits to our app and other Web sites and/or Applications in order to provide advertisements about goods and services of interest to you. If you would like more information about this practice and to know your choices about not having this information used by these companies, please see: [
https://thenai.org/opt-out/]
What are my opt-out rights?There are multiple opt-out options for users of this Application:

decoder_heading: Opt-out from the use of information to serve targeted advertising by advertisers and/or third-party network advertisers:
ident_heading: Opt-out from the use of information to serve targeted advertising by advertisers and/or third-party network advertisers:
heading_content_part: Opt-out from the use of information to serve targeted advertising by advertisers and/or third-party network advertisers:You may be able to opt-out of targeted advertising by adjusting related settings on your mobile device. The procedure may vary from device to device. For more information, please see: [https://thenai.org/opt-out/mobile-opt-out/]

decoder_heading: Data Retention Policy, Managing Your Information
ident_heading: Data Retention Policy, Managing Your Information
heading_content_part: Data Retention Policy, Managing Your InformationWe will retain User Provided data for as long as you use the Application and for a reasonable time thereafter. Our advertising partners may retain Automatically Collected information for a reasonable time and thereafter may store it in aggregate.

Data DeletionIf you would like us to delete the email id associated with your purchase, please contact us at[email protected]using the associated email id. We will delete your email id from our databases within a reasonable time. However, it should be noted that such deletion may result in loss of access to the premium (“Pro”) version of the Application. We do not store any other personally identifiable data.

ChildrenWe do not use the Application to knowingly solicit data from or market to children under the age of 13. If a parent or guardian becomes aware that his or her child has provided us with information without their consent, he or she should contact us at[email protected]. We will delete such information from our files within a reasonable time.
Security

We are concerned about safeguarding the confidentiality of your information. We provide physical, electronic, and procedural safeguards to protect information we process and maintain. For example, we limit access to this information to authorized employees and contractors who need to know that information in order to operate, develop or improve the Application. Please be aware that, although we endeavor to provide reasonable security for information we process and maintain, no security system can prevent all potential security breaches.

ChangesThis Privacy Policy may be updated from time to time for any reason. We will notify you of any changes to our Privacy Policy by posting the new Privacy Policy here and possibly informing you via email. You are advised to consult this Privacy Policy regularly for any changes, as continued use is deemed approval of all changes.

Your ConsentBy using the Application, you are consenting to our processing of your information as set forth in this Privacy Policy now and as amended by us. “Processing,” means using cookies on a computer/handheld device or using or touching information in any way, including, but not limited to, collecting, storing, deleting, using, combining and disclosing information.

Contact usIf you have any questions regarding privacy while using the Application, or have questions about our practices, please contact us via email at[email protected].© 2023 Supersonic SoftwareSupersonic Software
